synopsis: Mystery, intrigue and adventure await our heroes with all-new action-packed episodes. The dark side grows even stronger and the Jedi Knights are pushed to the limit. The lines between good and evil become blurred as secrets are uncovered, truths are questioned, and alliances are betrayed. In this transformative season of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, the fate of the galaxy hangs in the balance and the destiny of the "Chosen One" will at long last be revealed.
title: The Clone Wars - Season 3
